title: Design document intelligence (OCR + LLM extraction) + DSA review
focus: Hybrid OCR + vision-LM extraction; confidence scoring; HITL review.

items.label: Design document intelligence (OCR + LLM extraction)
interviewQuestions: Walk me through designing a system that ingests invoices/contracts and extracts structured fields.
How would you handle hand-written or low-quality scans?

items.label: Eval & confidence scoring
interviewQuestions: How would you flag low-confidence extractions for human review?
What's the unit cost of a human-review pass, and how do you optimize the routing threshold?

items.label: Mixed PDFs, scans, tables, and attachments
interviewQuestions: How would you process a document set that mixes PDFs, scanned images, tables, email attachments, and OCR errors?
How do you validate extracted fields when the source document has conflicting values?
When do you use vision-language models directly vs OCR + layout parsing + LLM extraction?

items.label: Clarify requirements, users, constraints, and business metric for: Design document intelligence (OCR + LLM extraction)
interviewQuestions: What are the first five clarifying questions before proposing any model?
What is the business metric, what is the ML proxy metric, and where can they diverge?
What scale, latency, freshness, privacy, and reliability constraints change the architecture?

items.label: Defend data, labels, baseline, model choice, feature freshness, and serving path for: Design document intelligence (OCR + LLM extraction)
interviewQuestions: What baseline would you launch before a complex model, and how would you know it is insufficient?
Where do labels come from, what bias do they contain, and how delayed are they?
Which features must be computed online vs offline, and what happens when the feature store is slow?

items.label: Cover monitoring, rollback, cost, security, failure modes, and launch plan for: Design document intelligence (OCR + LLM extraction)
interviewQuestions: What online metrics, guardrails, and cohort slices decide whether this system is safe to ramp?
What is the rollback trigger, fallback experience, and incident owner if quality or latency regresses?
What are the top security, privacy, abuse, or cost risks, and what controls would you ship in v1?

references.label: Chip Huyen — Machine Learning Systems Design
Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer exam guide
Google ML system design mock interview — YouTube recommendations
